arts.ttl: Former Arsenal star arrested on suspicion with link to attempted £600,000 cannabis import
arts.sum: Former Arsenal forward Jay Emmanuel-Thomas has reportedly been arrested for suspected links with an attempted import of as much as £600,000’s worth of cannabis into the UK. The 33-year-old came up through the Gunners’ academy but never made much of an impact on their first-team, instead forging a career for himself in the lower leagues. arts.ttl: Atalanta v Arsenal: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Atalanta are set to face Arsenal in the Champions League on Thursday at the Gewiss Stadium. Manager Gian Piero Gasperini is expected to deploy a 3-4-1-2 formation for this crucial match against the Premier League giants. In goal, Marco Carnesecchi is likely to retain his place as the first-choice goalkeeper. The three-man defense is expected to consist of Berat Djimsiti on the right, Isak Hien in the center, and former Arsenal player Sead Kolasinac on the left. The midfield four should see Raoul Bellanova and Davide Zappacosta operating as wing-backs, with Marten de Roon and Ederson forming the central partnership. The post Atalanta v Arsenal: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Five of Arsenal’s best wins against Italian teams
arts.sum: Arsenal travel to face Atalanta in the Champions League this evening, as Mikel Arteta’s team begin their European campaign. It’s a first-ever meeting between the two teams as Arsenal take on an Atalanta side who have exceeded all expectations in recent campaigns and won the Europa League last season. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta provides update on captain Martin Odegaard’s ankle injury
arts.sum: Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard faces a lengthy spell on the sidelines after a scan showed “significant” damage to his ankle.

arts.ttl: Report: Three European giants interested in signing £25m Arsenal player who’s open to January exit
Ex-Arsenal star Jay Emmanuel-Thomas charged with importing drugs in £600k plot
arts.sum: Jay Emmanuel-Thomas, who plays for Greenock Morton in the Scottish Championship, has been charged by police for allegedly trying to smuggle cannabis into the UK

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal striker is charged with importing drugs after £600,000 of cannabis is seized at Stansted Airport
arts.sum: The Greenock Morton striker, who joined the club earlier this summer on a free transfer, was arrested at 8am on Wednesday after UK Border Force officials found the drugs inside several suitcases.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans sure over Odegaard clue in Mikel Arteta press conference
arts.sum: A fifth added: “It looks to me more like he’s genuinely hoping it isn’t months, indicating that it’s a possibility.” Straw-clutching Arsenal fans reckon Martin Odegaard’s injury may not be as bad as feared after watching a Mikel Arteta press conference.
